title: Alternate Eva Opening Eva Beebop
wikitext:
[]: Alternate Eva Opening: Eva Beebop             Quote Post by ARS.SWK » Mon Jun 27, 2011 1:20 pm http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KJz-jMmp4tE seeing as this was posted back in '06, i feel like a nub for posting it now, but i do feel that everyone should watch this =D0 OP for 3.33? XD

[]:             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Mon Jun 27, 2011 1:41 pm Without a doubt the best Bebop opening parody I've seen.

[]:             Quote Post by biodude711 » Mon Jun 27, 2011 4:32 pm That was made of pure win.

[]:             Quote Post by SAWgunner » Mon Jun 27, 2011 7:33 pm That was so awesome I peed a little. Not only was it extremely well done but infinitely better than the real opening.

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Mon Jun 27, 2011 8:06 pm So much Ritsuko and Kaji, I guess they fit the jazzy opening better. I wish there are more Asuka... All in all very well done. I wonder whether it was made in Japan or in the west... Also like the Haruhi Beebop OP http://youtu.be/Zg_WVwJD1W4 and here the weighting given to the cast seems appropriate.

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Mon Jun 27, 2011 8:40 pm An old video but a good one.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Jun 28, 2011 2:39 am symbv wrote: All in all very well done. I wonder whether it was made in Japan or in the west...

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sun Jul 03, 2011 7:45 pm I agree it's a good vid (very good, actually), but I agree with Symbv in that it doesn't give appropriate weight to the main characters. There should be a lot more Shinji in there.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Jul 03, 2011 7:59 pm Bagheera wrote: I agree it's a good vid (very good, actually), but I agree with Symbv in that it doesn't give appropriate weight to the main characters. There should be a lot more Shinji in there.
